item.name: Activities

description.content: Operations for managing Target activities (A/B, XT, MVT, AP)

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Activities

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Activities

description.content: Returns a paginated list of all Target activities (A/B tests, experience targeting, multivariate tests, and automated personalization) in the tenant. Each entry includes the activity ID, name, type, state, and modification date.

query.description: Maximum number of activities to return.
Number of activities to skip for pagination.

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Create an Activity

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Create an Activity

description.content: Creates a new Target activity of the specified type (AB, XT, MVT, or Automated Personalization). The request body must include the activity name, type, and at least one experience with associated offers.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Get an Activity

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Get an Activity

description.content: Retrieves the full configuration and metadata of a single Target activity by its activity ID, including experiences, audiences, metrics, and scheduling.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Update an Activity

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Update an Activity

description.content: Updates an existing Target activity with new configuration. The full activity object must be provided in the request body.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Delete an Activity

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Delete an Activity

description.content: Permanently deletes a Target activity. Active activities should be deactivated before deletion.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Update Activity State

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Update Activity State

description.content: Activates, deactivates, or archives a Target activity by updating its state. Valid state transitions depend on the current state.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Audiences

description.content: Operations for managing Target audiences

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Audiences

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Audiences

description.content: Returns a paginated list of all audiences configured in Adobe Target. Each audience includes its ID, name, description, and targeting rules.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Create an Audience

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Create an Audience

description.content: Creates a new audience in Adobe Target with the specified name and targeting rules.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Get an Audience

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Get an Audience

description.content: Retrieves the full definition of a single audience by its audience ID, including all targeting rules and conditions.

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Update an Audience

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Update an Audience

description.content: Updates an existing audience with new targeting rules or metadata.

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Delete an Audience

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Delete an Audience

item.name: Delivery

description.content: Operations for real-time content delivery

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Deliver Personalized Experiences

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Deliver Personalized Experiences

description.content: The Target Delivery API endpoint for fetching personalized content for one or more mboxes. Used by client-side and server-side implementations to retrieve offers, execute page load decisions, and prefetch content for subsequent views.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Environments

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Environments

description.content: Returns a list of environments (development, staging, production) configured for the Adobe Target tenant.

item.name: Properties

description.content: Operations for managing enterprise properties

item.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Properties

request.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Properties

description.content: Returns a list of enterprise properties configured for the Adobe Target tenant. Properties are used with enterprise permissions to control access to activities and offers.

info.name: Adobe Experience Cloud Adobe Target API

description.content:
The Adobe Target API provides programmatic access to Adobe Target for managing activities, audiences, offers, properties, and environments. It enables developers to create and manage A/B tests, experience targeting, multivariate tests, and automated personalization activities, as well as deliver personalized content via the delivery API.

Contact Support:
 Name: Adobe Developer
